title: Bricasti M7 program-dump SysEx
disclaimer: Reverse-engineered from labeled captures in this repository. Not an official Bricasti specification. Dump-derived encodings and offsets are authoritative for this corpus.
kaitai_doc_extra: Sound-parameter value maps (affine scales / sparse tables) live alongside this layout in the companion .spec.json and in specification/prog/bytes/.

checksum.doc: CRC-16/ARC over raw SysEx bytes [8, checksum_start), packed as four high-nibble-first MIDI data bytes. Manufacturer ID and header are not covered.

encodings.raw_u8: Single SysEx data byte used as an unsigned integer.
encodings.ascii_space_padded: ASCII text, space-padded on the right to a fixed width.
encodings.raw_bytes: Opaque multi-byte region copied as-is (no scalar decode).
encodings.crc16_arc_u16_be_nibbles: CRC-16/ARC packed as four high-nibble-first SysEx bytes.

fields.label: SysEx start (F0)
fields.role: SysEx start (F0)

fields.label: manufacturer ID
fields.role: Manufacturer ID (00 62 63)

fields.label: program-dump header
fields.role: Program-dump header (70 08 01 00)

fields.label: program name (ASCII)
fields.role: Program name (ASCII, space-padded within 16-byte window) - confirmed against sysex/_presets/ filename preset (bank name is not stored here)

fields.label: register basis blob
fields.role: Register basis blob (`raw_bytes`): factory dumps space-pad with `0x20`; Reg-backed hold-EDIT dumps store a nibble-packed unedited copy of the register basis (see `sysex/prog/edit/registers/`)

fields.label: bank index
fields.role: Bank index (`nibble_hilo`) from sysex/_presets/ [Halls=0, Plates=1, Rooms=2, Chambers=3, Ambience=4, Spaces=5, Halls 2=6, Plates 2=7, Rooms 2=8, Spaces 2=9, NonLin=10]; mirrored at offset 137; hold EDIT sends use index 11 here while mirror 137 keeps the source bank (see sysex/_edit/)

fields.label: program slot
fields.role: Program slot within bank (`nibble_hilo`) from sysex/_presets/ (not a global program number)

fields.label: edit/generation counter
fields.role: Menu-browse flag: `00` when no parameter menu is open or while editing a value; `02` while a parameter menu is highlighted (see `sysex/prog/menus/` captures) (moved in independent series: early rolloff, _corpus)

fields.label: register page
fields.role: Register bank page (`raw_u8`): `B0`=`00` … when the dump basis is a user register (see `sysex/prog/edit/registers/`); `00` on factory/parameter-series dumps in this corpus

fields.label: structure version (always 8)
fields.role: Structure/version constant (`08` in all witnessed program dumps) — not a sound parameter

fields.label: register slot
fields.role: Register slot within page (`0`–`9`) when the dump basis is a user register; `00` on factory/parameter-series dumps in this corpus

fields.label: reserved (always 0)
fields.role: Reserved/unknown (always `00` in witnessed captures)

fields.label: algorithm/family flag
fields.role: Algorithm/family flag from corpus presets (Halls all 3; most other presets 4, with a few bank-leading exceptions also 3). Mirrored at 145 as 0 when 97=3 and 1 when 97=4 — not a clean V1/V2 bit

fields.label: selected menu index
fields.role: Selected front-panel menu index (`nibble_hilo`, 0–17) when a parameter menu is open; `00 00` when idle. Hardware menu order matches `PROGRAM_PARAMETERS` in catalog. Offset 92 disambiguates idle vs Reverb Time (both may show index 0) (moved in independent series: _corpus)

fields.label: reverb time
fields.role: Parameter `reverb time` (from independent series sysex/reverb time/) (nibble_hilo, table/index candidate (monotonic 100%))
fields.description: Mid-frequency reverb time. Sets the reverb time of the mid frequencies when the signal stops.
fields.encoding_notes: table/index candidate (monotonic 100%); extreme<->adjacent slopes disagree (low dlabel/denc=0.05, high=1); least-squares hint only (not used for endpoint unit conversion): label ~= 0.184881*encoded + -2.60411 (r^2=0.8241)

fields.label: size
fields.role: Parameter `size` (from independent series sysex/size/) (nibble_hilo, label = encoded * 1)
fields.description: Adjusts the apparent size of the late reverberant field.
fields.encoding_notes: label = encoded * 1; from agreeing extreme<->adjacent edge slopes

fields.label: predelay
fields.role: Parameter `predelay` (from independent series sysex/predelay/) (nibble_hilo, table/index candidate (monotonic 100%))
fields.description: Sets the amount of time which elapses between the input signal and the onset of reverberation.
fields.encoding_notes: table/index candidate (monotonic 100%); extreme<->adjacent slopes disagree (low dlabel/denc=2, high=8); least-squares hint only (not used for endpoint unit conversion): label ~= 5.55892*encoded + -23.4291 (r^2=0.9458)

fields.label: reserved padding
fields.role: Reserved padding (always 0) between predelay and diffusion

fields.label: diffusion
fields.role: Parameter `diffusion` (from independent series sysex/diffusion/) (raw_u8, label = encoded * 1)
fields.description: Sets initial diffusion of the reverb. Displayed and controlled as a percentage change from the initial value defined by the preset.
fields.encoding_notes: label = encoded * 1; from agreeing extreme<->adjacent edge slopes

fields.label: reserved padding
fields.role: Reserved padding (always 0) between diffusion and density

fields.label: density
fields.role: Parameter `density` (from independent series sysex/density/) (raw_u8, label = encoded * 1)
fields.description: Sets how the echo density builds up over time.
fields.encoding_notes: label = encoded * 1; from agreeing extreme<->adjacent edge slopes

fields.label: reserved padding
fields.role: Reserved padding (always 0) between density and modulation

fields.label: modulation
fields.role: Parameter `modulation` (from independent series sysex/modulation/) (raw_u8, label = encoded + (-1))
fields.description: Controls the amount of modulation and pitch variation in the later part of the reverberant field.
fields.encoding_notes: label = encoded + (-1); from agreeing extreme<->adjacent edge slopes

fields.label: rolloff
fields.role: Parameter `rolloff` (from independent series sysex/rolloff/) (nibble_hilo, table/index candidate (monotonic 100%))
fields.description: Low pass filter applied to the overall output of the reverb.
fields.encoding_notes: table/index candidate (monotonic 100%); extreme<->adjacent slopes disagree (low dlabel/denc=40, high=400); least-squares hint only (not used for endpoint unit conversion): label ~= 322.724*encoded + -1858.51 (r^2=0.9534)

fields.label: hf rt multiply
fields.role: Parameter `hf rt multiply` (from independent series sysex/hf rt multiply/) (nibble_hilo, label = encoded * 0.05 + (0.2))
fields.description: Sets the high-frequency reverb time above the crossover frequency set by HF RT Crossover. Displayed and controlled as a scaling of Reverb Time.
fields.encoding_notes: label = encoded * 0.05 + (0.2); from agreeing extreme<->adjacent edge slopes

fields.label: hf rt crossover
fields.role: Parameter `hf rt crossover` (from independent series sysex/hf rt crossover/) (nibble_hilo, table/index candidate (monotonic 100%))
fields.description: Sets the crossover frequency used by HF RT Multiply.
fields.encoding_notes: table/index candidate (monotonic 100%); extreme<->adjacent slopes disagree (low dlabel/denc=40, high=800); least-squares hint only (not used for endpoint unit conversion): label ~= 423.787*encoded + -1799.96 (r^2=0.8975)

fields.label: lf rt multiply
fields.role: Parameter `lf rt multiply` (from independent series sysex/lf rt multiply/) (nibble_hilo, table/index candidate (monotonic 100%))
fields.description: Sets the low-frequency reverb time below the crossover frequency set by LF RT Crossover. Displayed and controlled as a scaling of Reverb Time.
fields.encoding_notes: table/index candidate (monotonic 100%); extreme<->adjacent slopes disagree (low dlabel/denc=0.05, high=0.1); least-squares hint only (not used for endpoint unit conversion): label ~= 0.065962*encoded + 0.12727 (r^2=0.9915)

fields.label: lf rt crossover
fields.role: Parameter `lf rt crossover` (from independent series sysex/lf rt crossover/) (nibble_hilo, table/index candidate (monotonic 100%))
fields.description: Sets the crossover frequency used by LF RT Multiply.
fields.encoding_notes: table/index candidate (monotonic 100%); extreme<->adjacent slopes disagree (low dlabel/denc=40, high=400); least-squares hint only (not used for endpoint unit conversion): label ~= 183.53*encoded + -413.243 (r^2=0.9309)

fields.label: vlf cut
fields.role: Parameter `vlf cut` (from independent series sysex/vlf cut/) (nibble_hilo, label = encoded + (-20))
fields.description: Cuts the very low frequency content of the initial part of both the early and late reverberant fields.
fields.encoding_notes: label = encoded + (-20); from agreeing extreme<->adjacent edge slopes

fields.label: early to reverb mix
fields.role: Parameter `early to reverb mix` (from independent series sysex/early to reverb mix/) (nibble_hilo, label = encoded * 1)
fields.description: Sets the balance between the early and later parts of the reverberant fields.
fields.encoding_notes: label = encoded * 1; from agreeing extreme<->adjacent edge slopes

fields.label: early rolloff
fields.role: Parameter `early rolloff` (from independent series sysex/early rolloff/) (nibble_hilo, table/index candidate (monotonic 100%))
fields.description: Sets the rolloff frequency point of the low pass filter for the early part of the reverberant field.
fields.encoding_notes: table/index candidate (monotonic 100%); extreme<->adjacent slopes disagree (low dlabel/denc=40, high=400); least-squares hint only (not used for endpoint unit conversion): label ~= 321.537*encoded + -980.481 (r^2=0.9882)

fields.label: early select
fields.role: Parameter `early select` (from independent series sysex/early select/) (nibble_hilo, label = encoded * 1)
fields.description: Controls the build up and decay characteristics of the early part of the reverberant field. The V2 addendum expands the selection beyond the printed 0–20 to 0–31 with larger, more spread-out early variants for a slower early reverb build-up (available on both V1 and V2 algorithm presets).
fields.encoding_notes: label = encoded * 1; from agreeing extreme<->adjacent edge slopes

fields.label: engine/bank-class flag
fields.role: Engine/bank-class flag: 0 on classic banks (Halls…Spaces), 1 on `* 2` banks (Halls 2…Spaces 2), 2 on NonLin. Parameter-series dumps also show 1 because they were captured from Large Church (Halls 2)

fields.label: fixed (always 02 00)
fields.role: Fixed companion to offset 130 (always `02 00` in this corpus)

fields.label: delay level
fields.role: Parameter `delay level` (from independent series sysex/delay level/) (raw_u8, label = encoded + (-21))
fields.description: Level of the delayed input injected into the start of the late reverb (not the early reverb). The delayed sound is the original input signal, delayed, diffused, and band-limited by Rolloff.
fields.encoding_notes: label = encoded + (-21); from agreeing extreme<->adjacent edge slopes

fields.label: delay time
fields.role: Parameter `delay time` (from independent series sysex/delay time/) (nibble_hilo, label = encoded * 8 + (100))
fields.description: Delay time for a diffused set of eight voices spread in time (controlled as a single delay). Adds coloration and a late swell to the late reverb.
fields.encoding_notes: label = encoded * 8 + (100); from agreeing extreme<->adjacent edge slopes

fields.label: reserved (always 0)
fields.role: Reserved (always 0) between delay time and bank-index mirror

fields.label: bank index mirror
fields.role: Bank index mirror (equals offset 89) from sysex/_presets/; on hold-EDIT dumps this stays the source bank while 88-89 are Edit index 11

fields.label: reserved (always 0)
fields.role: Reserved (always 0) between bank-index mirror and delay modulation

fields.label: delay modulation
fields.role: Parameter `delay modulation` (from independent series sysex/delay modulation/) (raw_u8, label = encoded + (-1))
fields.description: Modulates the delay voices only (not the reverb), similar in character to reverb Modulation: low settings are slower and more shallow; higher settings are more random and deeper.
fields.encoding_notes: label = encoded + (-1); from agreeing extreme<->adjacent edge slopes

fields.label: reserved (always 0)
fields.role: Reserved block (always 0 in this corpus)

fields.label: family-flag mirror
fields.role: Mirror of algorithm/family flag at 97 (145=0 when 97=3; 145=1 when 97=4 in this corpus)

fields.label: display
fields.role: Display (`nibble_hilo`): high nibble = page/row while browsing (`92=02`) or edit anchor while changing a value (`92=00`); low nibble = position within the menu page, or value-display position while editing. From `sysex/prog/menus/` captures

fields.label: reserved (always 0)
fields.role: Reserved (always 0) immediately before checksum nibbles

fields.label: checksum (CRC-16/ARC)
fields.role: Checksum: CRC-16/ARC over offsets 8-151 (name + payload), packed as four high-nibble-first SysEx bytes (per-dump; recompute after edits - do not copy across parameter series)

fields.label: SysEx end (F7)
fields.role: SysEx end (F7)
